'''Tyresi Gurtt''' was [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of [[Bolt Squadron (Khuiumin Survivors)|Bolt]] and part of the [[Khuiumin Survivors]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Gurtt was a [[Eyttyrmin Batiiv]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] serving along [[Jacob Nive]]. She later became a [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] and became a crew member of the ''[[Invidious]]'' after the [[Battle of Xa Fel (11 ABY)|Second Battle of Xa Fel]], under the command of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Leonia Tavira]]. When [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] attack the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], Gurtt was offered immunity with her cooperation.

{{Char-stub}}
